content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's reads are visible, specific, and timely throughout. Turn 2 catches the opening laugh as a signal rather than taking it at face value. Turn 6 names the deflection ('you didn't quite answer the question') and redirects to somatic experience. Turn 8 names the rehearsing/redirecting move in real time ('you handed me a different question to answer'). Turn 10 catches the hollow 'totally fine' as it lands — a textbook linguistic-caveat read. Turn 12 reads the somatic shift from animation to stillness and inquires into it. Turn 14 catches the bright-voiced closing-the-door move and the attachment-theory intellectualization, holding her to the live phrase 'without me having to earn it.' Each read precedes a question, distinguishes the said from the shown, and lands at the moment that changes the conversation — culminating in the client touching the avoided emotion in turn 15. The defensiveness-as-identity-signal and looking-for-whats-wrong reads are operative even if not named by term.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Immediate read on the opening laugh — refuses to take it at face value."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Question without an explicit read, but probing the avoided territory."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the non-answer explicitly and redirects to somatic — distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the handing-over-a-better-question move in real time — a precise read on the deflection pattern."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the hollow 'totally fine' as linguistic caveat — read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the somatic shift to stillness and inquires into it specifically."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the bright-voiced door-closing and the attachment-theory intellectualization; holds her to the live phrase."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "anxious-avoidant-dynamic (only client-named, coach did not surface as pattern read)"],
  "notes": "Strong somatic-and-linguistic tracking throughout. The coach consistently names what they noticed before asking, which is the hallmark of a 3."
}
